title: Palladium Piece
description:
Addon that brings Devil Fruit powers to your game via Palladium. Made by Dagilio. 
#マインクラフト
#ワンピース
body:
![The logo for my addon reading "Palladium Piece"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af0947b24e3a0362426821e5ec38b3a782aeb58c.png)

## **What is this?**

This is my addon for the [Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium) mod that adds Devil Fruit powers from [One Piece](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0388629/) to your game.

### **List of added Powers**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Ice-Ice Fruit (Hie-Hie no Mi)
- Flame-Flame Fruit (Mera-Mera no Mi)
- Lightning-Lightning Fruit (Goro-Goro no Mi)
- Venom-Venom Fruit (Doku-Doku no Mi)
- Woods-Woods Fruit (Mori-Mori no Mi)

</details>



### **How to Obtain Devil Fruits**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
-To get a Devil Fruit in **creative mode**, either open up the item browser and head to the "Devil Fruits" creative tab, or use the /give command.

-To get one in **survival mode**, you must open up a Treasure Chest which provides you with a random fruit.

-There are three kinds of Treasure Chests: **Decayed**, **Pirate** and **Marine**. Decayed Chests have a high chance of containing trash, but have a very small chance to contain a Devil Fruit. Pirate Chests have a higher chance of containing a Devil Fruit and better vanilla loot like gold, diamonds, etc. Marine Chests guarantee a Devil Fruit inside.

-To **obtain** Treasure Chests you can kill a Marine.

-To **open** a Treasure Chest of any kind, right-click it in your hand.


</details>

### **List of added Weapons (Check Gallery For Crafting)**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-Black Blade Yoru (Mihawk's Sword)

-Dark Dagger Kogatana (Mihawk's Dagger)

</details>




### **Credits and licensing**

Credit to ThreeTAG and creators of the Palladium mod which the powers are mostly built from. Credit to Eiichiro Oda for all original characters and powers from One Piece used in this addon. Use this for your modpack or however you would like.
